title: get_config
description: Retrieves the complete device configuration in a single response — equivalent to calling get_version, get_status, get_current_region, get_wifi, get_eth, get_endpoint_config, and get_installed_certificate all at once. The response includes: readerVersion (model, serial, firmware), deviceStatus (battery, temperature, radio, power), currentRegion (country, frequencies, power limits), wifiConfig (SSID, IP, security), ethConfig (ethernet status), epConfig (MQTT endpoint settings), installedCerts (certificate details), and eventConfiguration (enabled events/alerts). This is a read-only command — use set_config to change settings.

command.description: Specifies the operation being performed, in this case, retrieving the complete device configuration.

requestId.description: A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation.
